meaning: 甯冩媺鐡︾害[娲ュ反甯冮煢瑗垮崡閮ㄥ煄甯俔
examples: My grandfather is buried at the famous Number 6 cemetery in Bulawayo whilst my own father is buried in a graveyard situated next to the Hwange Thermal Power Station.
Though ostensibly silent, a handwritten letter from someone we know speaks with the voice-querulous, joking, ardent, tinged with an accent from Padua or bulawayo-of its author.
He was arrested at a music festival in Bulawayo for not having a work permit.
Lara hit 191 against Zimbabwe in Bulawayo to surpass Viv Richards' career total of 8, 540 Test runs.
Bulawayo's loathing of Mr Mpofu is so strong that he dare not address public meetings in the city.
